hooks.command: Read Wikipedia/_cache.md for recent context. Then run SKILL-status to check for new files in Wikipedia/raw/. Also check Wikipedia/raw/youtube_queue.md for pending videos in the 'Pending' table. If there are uncompiled files or pending videos, ask the user: 'There are X new files and Y pending videos — do you want me to compile them?'
Update Wikipedia/_cache.md with a summary of what was done this session, which pages were touched, and any open questions.
